auth.label: API Subscription Key
auth.description: Tisane API subscription key sent in the Ocp-Apim-Subscription-Key header. View your key in the Tisane Developer Portal.

actions.name: analyze_text
actions.description: Analyze text with Tisane for problematic content, sentiment, entities, topics, and other linguistic features.

language.description: The IETF language tag used by Tisane, such as en or zh-CN.

content.description: The UTF-8 text content to send to Tisane.

settings.description: Optional Tisane settings forwarded to the endpoint. Use official Tisane configuration keys.

inputSchema.description: Input parameters for Tisane text analysis.

text.description: The input text echoed by Tisane.

anyOf.description: The detected or analyzed language code when Tisane returns it.
A topic string returned by Tisane.
The raw object returned by Tisane.

topics.description: The topics returned by Tisane as strings or detailed topic objects.

items.description: The raw object returned by Tisane.

abuse.description: The raw objects returned by Tisane.

items.description: The raw object returned by Tisane.

sentenceList.description: The raw objects returned by Tisane.

items.description: The raw object returned by Tisane.

entitiesSummary.description: The raw objects returned by Tisane.

items.description: The raw object returned by Tisane.

sentimentExpressions.description: The raw objects returned by Tisane.

anyOf.description: The raw object returned by Tisane.

raw.description: The raw object returned by Tisane.

outputSchema.description: The normalized text analysis result from Tisane.

actions.name: calculate_similarity
actions.description: Calculate the semantic similarity between two text fragments, either in one language or across languages.

language1.description: The IETF language tag used by Tisane, such as en or zh-CN.

content1.description: The first UTF-8 text fragment to compare.

language2.description: The IETF language tag used by Tisane, such as en or zh-CN.

content2.description: The second UTF-8 text fragment to compare.

settings.description: Optional Tisane settings forwarded to the endpoint. Use official Tisane configuration keys.

inputSchema.description: Input parameters for calculating semantic similarity with Tisane.

similarity.description: The semantic similarity score between 0 and 1.

outputSchema.description: The semantic similarity score returned by Tisane.

actions.name: compare_entities
actions.description: Compare two compound person entities with Tisane and return whether they are the same or different.

language1.description: The IETF language tag used by Tisane, such as en or zh-CN.

entity1.description: The first person entity text to compare.

language2.description: The IETF language tag used by Tisane, such as en or zh-CN.

entity2.description: The second person entity text to compare.

type.description: The entity type to compare. Tisane currently supports person.

inputSchema.description: Input parameters for comparing two Tisane person entities.

result.description: The comparison result returned by Tisane.

differences.description: The difference categories returned by Tisane when entities differ.

raw.description: The raw object returned by Tisane.

outputSchema.description: The entity comparison result returned by Tisane.

actions.name: detect_language
actions.description: Detect the language segments used in a text fragment with optional language hints and delimiter settings.

content.description: The UTF-8 text content to send to Tisane.

languages.description: Optional vertical-bar-delimited language hints, such as en|ru|he.

delimiter.description: Optional delimiter expression used by Tisane to segment the text.

inputSchema.description: Input parameters for Tisane language detection.

anyOf.description: The character offset where this language segment starts.
The length of this language segment.

language.description: The detected language code for this segment.

anyOf.description: The confidence score returned by Tisane.

raw.description: The raw object returned by Tisane.

items.description: One language segment detected by Tisane.

raw.description: The raw object returned by Tisane.

outputSchema.description: The language detection result returned by Tisane.

actions.name: extract_text
actions.description: Remove markup such as HTML, CSS, JavaScript, or JSON from UTF-8 text and return plain decoded text.

content.description: The UTF-8 markup content to clean up.

inputSchema.description: Input parameters for extracting text with Tisane.

outputSchema.description: The plain text extracted by Tisane.

actions.name: list_supported_languages
actions.description: List the languages currently supported by Tisane.

inputSchema.description: The input payload for listing Tisane supported languages.

isoCode.description: The IETF language tag supported by Tisane.

anyOf.description: The native encoding reported by Tisane.
The recommended display font reported by Tisane.
Whether the language uses a Latin script.
Whether the language is written right-to-left.

raw.description: The raw object returned by Tisane.

outputSchema.description: The supported languages returned by Tisane.

actions.name: transform_text
actions.description: Translate text between languages with Tisane, or paraphrase text when source and target languages match.

from.description: The source IETF language tag. Use * or a vertical-bar-delimited list to ask Tisane to auto-detect.

content.description: The UTF-8 text content to send to Tisane.

settings.description: Optional Tisane settings forwarded to the endpoint. Use official Tisane configuration keys.

inputSchema.description: Input parameters for translating or paraphrasing text with Tisane.

outputSchema.description: The transformed text returned by Tisane.
